message:
fix(core): handle bit shift overflow in denseKmerMemoryCost for k>15

- Add Math.pow fallback for k > 15 to avoid JS 32-bit integer masking
  (1 << 32 === 1 in JS, but 4^16 = 4294967296)
- Clarify documentation about WASM bigint vs JS number types for total_valid
- Note interface differences between WASM DenseKmerResult and JS fallback

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
